# activateServer(_:)

**Instance Method**

Activates the input method server.

## Declaration

```swift
func activateServer(_ sender: Any!)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object sending the activation message.

## Activating and Deactivating the Server

- **deactivateServer(_:)**: Deactivates the input method server.
title: activateServer(_:)
